commands.help: Request an enrollment certificate on behalf of another user
commands.long_help: Uses an enrollment agent certificate (with XCN_OID_ENROLLMENT_AGENT in MSApplicationPolicies) to request a certificate as another user in the domain. On success, the resulting PFX is downloaded via the C2 framework's file download mechanism.

arguments.name: template
arguments.desc: Certificate template to request on behalf of the target user

arguments.name: requester
arguments.desc: Domain\username to request the certificate on behalf of (e.g., EXAMPLE\Administrator)

arguments.name: download-name
arguments.desc: Filename for the downloaded PFX (e.g., Admin.pfx)

arguments.name: enrollment-cert
arguments.desc: Path to enrollment agent PFX file with OID_ENROLLMENT_AGENT extension
